TempleInfo.name: Mallakam Neeliyampanai Pillaiyar Kovil
TempleInfo.tagline: Where Faith Meets Eternity & Divine Grace Awaits Every Seeker
TempleInfo.aboutDescription: Founded on the sacred grounds of Mallakam in the Jaffna peninsula, the Neeliyampathi Pillaiyar Kovil stands as a beacon of spiritual heritage and devotion. Our temple is a sacred sanctuary where the divine presence of Lord Pillaiyar blesses all who enter through its hallowed archway.
TempleInfo.aboutQuote: Like a lotus of Realised divine glory of Ganapathy – Mallakam temple is a spiritual fortress that has stood the test of time, nurturing generations of devotees.
TempleInfo.history: With centuries of unbroken tradition, this temple has been the spiritual heart of Mallakam, witnessing and nurturing the faith of countless families across generations.

Events.title: Spiritual Gatherings
Events.subtitle: JSacred Calendar of Devotion
Events.discription: Join us in celebrating sacred festivals and special pujas that connect our community in divine worship.
